untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options strategy (call ratio spread / roll-down) with specific strike price relationships and net cost calculations. The allowed indicators are equity price/technical indicators only. Options-specific metrics (strike prices, implied volatility, option Greeks, bid-ask spreads, net debit/credit calculations) are not available in the indicator list. The core entry condition—'proceeds from selling 2 higher strike calls equal cost of buying 1 lower strike call'—requires options pricing data that cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_51 is an options strategy and cannot be translated to equity price action rules. To implement this strategy, a separate options-specific backtesting engine with access to option chain data, strike prices, and implied volatility is required.
